---
title: "4.1 Simple Rules: Aggregate-Daily (Store Type A)"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-04-08"
---

## Goal

Compare simple aggregate-daily baselines for Store Type A:

1. Global average (average of all observations in training subset)
2. Persistence (last observation)
3. Persistence by period (value from same day in previous week)
4. IID by period (historical mean for same day-of-week)

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Data

```{r data}
library(tidyverse)

train_data <- readr::read_csv(
  "../../data/processed/store_type_a_train_aggregate_daily.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    DayOfWeek = as.integer(DayOfWeek)
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Date)

test_dates <- readr::read_csv(
  "../../data/processed/store_type_a_test_aggregate_daily.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    DayOfWeek = as.integer(format(Date, "%u"))
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Date)

head(train_data)
```

## Holdout Split Setup

```{r holdout-split}
set.seed(443)

holdout_prop <- 0.20
n_total <- nrow(train_data)
n_train <- floor((1 - holdout_prop) * n_total)

train_subset <- train_data |> dplyr::slice(1:n_train)
holdout_subset <- train_data |> dplyr::slice((n_train + 1):n_total)

holdout_split <- tibble::tibble(
  n_total = n_total,
  n_train = n_train,
  n_holdout = n_total - n_train,
  train_start = min(train_subset$Date),
  train_end = max(train_subset$Date),
  holdout_start = min(holdout_subset$Date),
  holdout_end = max(holdout_subset$Date)
)

holdout_split
```

## Models

```{r models}
global_average_holdout_fc <- function(data, n_train) {
  idx_holdout <- (n_train + 1):nrow(data)
  rep(mean(data$Sales[seq_len(n_train)], na.rm = TRUE), length(idx_holdout))
}

persistence_holdout_fc <- function(data, n_train) {
  idx_holdout <- (n_train + 1):nrow(data)
  data$Sales[idx_holdout - 1]
}

persistence_by_period_holdout_fc <- function(data, n_train, seasonal_period = 7) {
  idx_holdout <- (n_train + 1):nrow(data)
  if (n_train <= seasonal_period) {
    stop("Training subset must be longer than seasonal_period for persistence_by_period.")
  }
  data$Sales[idx_holdout - seasonal_period]
}

iid_by_period_holdout_fc <- function(data, n_train) {
  idx_holdout <- (n_train + 1):nrow(data)

  purrr::map_dbl(idx_holdout, function(i) {
    dow_i <- data$DayOfWeek[i]
    history_idx <- seq_len(i - 1)
    hist_vals <- data$Sales[history_idx][data$DayOfWeek[history_idx] == dow_i]

    if (length(hist_vals) == 0) {
      mean(data$Sales[seq_len(n_train)], na.rm = TRUE)
    } else {
      mean(hist_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  })
}

holdout_model_registry <- list(
  global_average = global_average_holdout_fc,
  persistence = persistence_holdout_fc,
  persistence_by_period = persistence_by_period_holdout_fc,
  iid_by_period = iid_by_period_holdout_fc
)

global_average_future_fc <- function(train_df, future_df) {
  tibble::tibble(Date = future_df$Date, yhat = mean(train_df$Sales, na.rm = TRUE))
}

persistence_future_fc <- function(train_df, future_df) {
  tibble::tibble(Date = future_df$Date, yhat = dplyr::last(train_df$Sales))
}

persistence_by_period_future_fc <- function(train_df, future_df, seasonal_period = 7) {
  pattern <- tail(train_df$Sales, seasonal_period)
  tibble::tibble(Date = future_df$Date, yhat = rep(pattern, length.out = nrow(future_df)))
}

iid_by_period_future_fc <- function(train_df, future_df) {
  dow_means <- train_df |>
    dplyr::group_by(DayOfWeek) |>
    dplyr::summarise(mean_sales = mean(Sales, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  fallback_mean <- mean(train_df$Sales, na.rm = TRUE)

  future_df |>
    dplyr::left_join(dow_means, by = "DayOfWeek") |>
    dplyr::transmute(Date, yhat = dplyr::coalesce(mean_sales, fallback_mean))
}

future_model_registry <- list(
  global_average = global_average_future_fc,
  persistence = persistence_future_fc,
  persistence_by_period = persistence_by_period_future_fc,
  iid_by_period = iid_by_period_future_fc
)
```

## Holdout Evaluation

```{r holdout-evaluation}
rmse_vec <- function(actual, pred) sqrt(mean((actual - pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE))

holdout_predictions_wide <- tibble::tibble(
  Date = holdout_subset$Date,
  actual = holdout_subset$Sales
)

model_prediction_cols <- purrr::imap(holdout_model_registry, function(fc_fn, model_name) {
  preds <- fc_fn(train_data, n_train)
  tibble::tibble(!!model_name := preds)
})

holdout_predictions_wide <- dplyr::bind_cols(holdout_predictions_wide, model_prediction_cols)

holdout_predictions_long <- holdout_predictions_wide |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(Date, actual),
    names_to = "model",
    values_to = "predicted"
  )

holdout_rmse_summary <- holdout_predictions_long |>
  dplyr::group_by(model) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    holdout_rmse = rmse_vec(actual, predicted),
    n_holdout = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(holdout_rmse)

holdout_rmse_summary
```

```{r holdout-plot, fig.width=9, fig.height=4}
best_model_name <- holdout_rmse_summary$model[[1]]

plot_df <- holdout_predictions_long |>
  dplyr::filter(model == best_model_name)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = actual, color = "Actual")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = predicted, color = "Predicted")) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Simple Holdout: 1-Step Forecasts (", best_model_name, ")", sep = ""),
    x = "Date",
    y = "Sales",
    color = "Series"
  )
```

## Final Forecast

```{r final-forecast}
best_model_name <- holdout_rmse_summary$model[[1]]
best_model_fn <- future_model_registry[[best_model_name]]

simple_aggregate_test_forecast <- best_model_fn(train_data, test_dates) |>
  dplyr::mutate(predicted_aggregate_sales = pmax(0, yhat)) |>
  dplyr::select(Date, predicted_aggregate_sales)

best_model_name
head(simple_aggregate_test_forecast)
```

## Save Outputs

```{r save-results}
dir.create("results", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

readr::write_csv(holdout_split, "results/simple_rules_aggregate_holdout_split.csv")
readr::write_csv(holdout_predictions_long, "results/simple_rules_aggregate_holdout_predictions.csv")
readr::write_csv(holdout_rmse_summary, "results/simple_rules_aggregate_holdout_rmse_summary.csv")
readr::write_csv(simple_aggregate_test_forecast, "results/simple_rules_aggregate_test_forecast.csv")
```
